name: THE OMEGA-SPM-DOSE and OMEGA-SPM-PAD: Specialized Pro-Resolving Mediators in Patients With Peripheral Artery Disease
summary: A ClinicalTrials.gov registry for a completed SPM Emulsion and SPM Softgel study in healthy volunteers, peripheral artery disease, and osteoarthritis cohorts, with no posted registry results in the current June 2, 2026 API view.
